name: Cost Per Delivery by Transporter
query:
SELECT
	tcr.name as "Trip Cost Reconciliation:Link/Trip Cost Reconciliation:200",
	tcr.delivery_trip as "Delivery Trip:Link/Delivery Trip:150",
	dt.transporter as "Transporter:Link/Transporter:150",
	dt.trip_date as "Trip Date:Date:120",
	tcr.fuel_cost as "Fuel Cost:Currency:120",
	tcr.transporter_payout as "Transporter Payout:Currency:150",
	tcr.total_stops as "Total Stops:Int:100",
	tcr.cost_per_stop as "Cost Per Stop:Currency:130"
FROM `tabTrip Cost Reconciliation` tcr
INNER JOIN `tabDelivery Trip` dt ON dt.name = tcr.delivery_trip
ORDER BY dt.trip_date DESC
chart_options: {"type": "Bar", "title": "Cost Per Stop by Transporter", "x_field": "Transporter", "y_fields": ["Cost Per Stop"], "filters": []}
